# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment YAML for our Python web application. The app runs a Flask API on port 5000. We need 3 replicas for high availability. Keep the configuration simple for quick deployment to our production cluster.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: python-web-app
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: python-web-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: python-web-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: python-web-app
        image: <your_image_name>
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5000
        env:
        - name: PORT
          value: "5000"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: python-web-app-svc
spec:
  selector:
    app: python-web-app
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 5000
  type: LoadBalancer
